title: SecretUri fields are public and mutable; no invariant enforcement
description: SecretUri (core lib:530-536) exposes backend, path, and params as public mutable String/HashMap fields. A contributor implementing a new backend could accidentally write to these after construction. Today all backends only read from SecretUri, so no bug exists, but a future contributor following the pattern 'parsed.path = modified' would silently create a discrepancy between the original URI and what the backend uses. Suggested: make fields pub(crate) or readonly, or note the convention in the type docs.
